channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hamilton family mourns 16-year-old son killed in mall shooting
item.description: Nabil Askafe, a 16-year-old student from Westdale Secondary School in Hamilton, was tragically shot and killed at Jackson Square mall on April 24, shortly after leaving home. His parents, Hala Tatish ...

item.title: Local sentiment in St Helens shifts as Labour faces challenge from Reform UK
item.description: St Helens, a town in Merseyside historically loyal to Labour, is witnessing growing dissatisfaction among its residents. Once a thriving industrial hub powered by coal, glass, and pharmaceuticals, the...

item.title: Ten people die in Kenya amid floods and dam overflow warnings
item.description: At least ten people have tragically lost their lives in Kenya following heavy rainfall that triggered flooding and landslides across several regions. Eastern Kenya reported seven of the fatalities, wh...

item.title: Key Kerala Assembly Constituencies to Watch in 2026 Polls from Kannur to Paravur
item.description: The Kerala assembly elections 2026 are nearing results, and several constituencies have emerged as critical battlegrounds that could influence both local and state-wide political outcomes. The main co...

item.title: President Ruto Dazzles Crowd With Impromptu Dance at Labour Day in Vihiga
item.description: During the 61st Labour Day celebrations held in Vihiga County, President William Ruto stole the spotlight with an unexpected display of dance moves to the popular Vaida song. This marked a historic ed...

item.title: Mamata and Abhishek Banerjee Brief TMC Counting Agents Ahead of Bengal Election Results
item.description: Ahead of the counting of votes for the West Bengal Assembly elections scheduled on May 4, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee and TMC national general secretary Abhishek Banerjee held a virtual meeting wit...

item.title: RJ Barrett's Last-Second Three-Point Shot Secures Raptors' Victory Over Cavaliers in Game 6
item.description: RJ Barrett made a clutch 29-foot three-pointer with 1.2 seconds left in overtime, lifting the Toronto Raptors to a 112-110 victory over the Cleveland Cavaliers. This win prevented playoff elimination ...

item.title: Pakistan rejects UK diplomat’s comments, cites cross-border attacks and security concerns on Afghan border
item.description: Pakistan’s Foreign Office has strongly responded to remarks made by British Special Representative for Afghanistan Richard Lindsay regarding the situation along the Pak-Afghan border, calling them one...

item.title: Kenya President William Ruto to Address Tanzanian Parliament on May 5, 2026
item.description: Dodoma, Tanzania — Tanzania is preparing for an important visit from Kenya's President William Ruto, who is set to address the Tanzanian Parliament on May 5, 2026. The announcement was made today, Apr...

item.title: Equity Bank Opens Multiple Job Opportunities Across Kenya and Rwanda
item.description: Equity Bank Group has announced a fresh round of job opportunities targeting both graduates and experienced professionals across Kenya and Rwanda. The bank is looking to fill a variety of roles rangin...

item.title: Police Officer Fired for Mishandling Deaths of Estranged Wife and Son
item.description: A police officer, Senior Master Sergeant John Mollenido, was officially dismissed from the Philippine National Police after being found guilty of grave misconduct, neglect of duty, and conduct unbecom...

item.title: Arizona Women Sue Over Unauthorized AI-Generated Porn Using Their Images
item.description: Three women from Arizona have filed a lawsuit against three men who allegedly used their photos to create AI-generated porn and then taught others to do the same through online courses. The women, inc...

item.title: Police Investigating Death of Nairobi Hospital Doctor Job Obwaka, Woman Arrested
item.description: The death of Job Obwaka, a prominent gynaecologist and director at Nairobi Hospital, has raised questions as police investigate his sudden passing. Obwaka, aged 83, collapsed in Kitengela while runnin...

item.title: Spirit Airlines collapses amid fuel price surge linked to Iran conflict
item.description: Spirit Airlines, a US-based low-cost carrier, has ceased operations after failing to secure creditor backing for a proposed $500 million government bailout. The shutdown marks the first airline collap...

item.title: Schedule and Predictions for 2026 Assembly Election Results in Five States and Puducherry
item.description: The counting of votes for the 2026 assembly elections in Assam, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal, and Puducherry is set to begin at 8 am on May 4. This election will determine the outcome for 824 assem...

item.title: Pastor Adeboye Says God Has Already Determined Nigeria’s Next President
item.description: Pastor Enoch Adeboye, the General Overseer of Redeemed Christian Church of God (RCCG), yan say the next president of Nigeria wey go take over after the 2027 general elections don already dey decided b...

item.title: Debate grows over forming criminal investigation body after Chande report on 2025 election violence
item.description: There is now a strong debate in Tanzania among political leaders, academics, and civil society on whether the country should establish a special criminal justice commission following the Chande report...

item.title: A New Global Conflict: The 'New World War' and the Shifting Landscape of Modern Warfare
item.description: The article explores the rising global tensions, suggesting the world is heading toward a major conflict that could surpass current confrontations in both intensity and scale. This potential conflict ...

item.title: Government Unveils Plans to Boost Employment and Protect Workers
item.description: On International Workers' Day 2026, South Africa's Employment and Labour Minister Nomakhosazana Meth emphasised the crucial role of workers as the 'heartbeat of the economy'. The Minister highlighted ...

item.title: IMF Praises Tanzania for Strong Cooperation in Economic and Climate-Related Reforms
item.description: Dodoma — The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has praised Tanzania for its active cooperation in implementing economic reforms under the Extended Credit Facility (ECF) and Resilience Sustainability F...
